workflow.name: LLM Suggestion Bulk Review Workflow
workflow.description: FE-17 them batch review workflow tren durable `LlmSuggestion` rows de user co the approve hoac reject hang loat theo filter ma van reuse FE-15 materialization logic va FE-16 feedback-compatible read model.

architectureOverview.summary: Khac voi FE-15 single review, FE-17 chon mot tap `Pending` suggestions theo filter roi xu ly batch. `TestGeneration` van la primary module. Khong tao table moi; chi them CQRS/controller surface va reuse shared review service.
architectureOverview.futureExtension: Future scope co the them bulk modify hoac bulk feedback, nhung FE-17 v1 chi gom bulk approve/reject.

usage: Check `MaxTestCasesPerSuite` for the total batch size before bulk approve.
Increment the same limit once after the batch is approved successfully.

steps.action: Validate suite existence, suite ownership, supported action, and optional filter enums.
Load matching `Pending` suggestions for the suite, apply filters, and order by `DisplayOrder`.
Approve the batch transactionally: materialize `TestCase` graph, update suggestions, create change logs, and create one `TestSuiteVersion` entry.
Validate suite ownership, supported action, and non-empty `ReviewNotes`.
Load matching `Pending` suggestions using the same filter semantics and deterministic ordering.
Reject the batch transactionally by updating review metadata only.
Return 200 with summary counts and no applied test case ids.
Load the filtered `Pending` suggestion set and find zero rows.
Return a result model with zero counts and no side effects.

nonTransactionalWrites: Zero-match path should return without writes.

qualityGates.name: No New Review Storage
qualityGates.rule: FE-17 phai reuse `LlmSuggestion` durable rows. Khong tao batch aggregate table moi.

qualityGates.name: No Per-Item Command Loop
qualityGates.rule: Bulk endpoint khong duoc dispatch lai tung single-review command trong loop; phai dung shared batch-capable service.

qualityGates.name: Pending Only
qualityGates.rule: Chi `Pending` suggestions moi duoc xu ly trong batch. Suggestions da approved/rejected/superseded phai bi bo qua vi khong nam trong query target set.

qualityGates.name: No Unexpected Migration
qualityGates.rule: Preferred FE-17 implementation khong can migration. Neu EF model thay doi thi phai quay lai migration gate cua `AGENTS.md`.

qualityGates.name: Preserve FE-15 And FE-16
qualityGates.rule: Single review, feedback reads, va feedback writes phai tiep tuc hoat dong nhu truoc.

examples: ReviewNotes la bat buoc khi bulk reject suggestions.
Khong tim thay test suite voi ma '{testSuiteId}'.
CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT: Suggestion da duoc thay doi boi thao tac khac.
ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Chua co approved API order.
MAX_TEST_CASES_LIMIT_REACHED: Vuot qua gioi han test case cua goi subscription.

implementationChecklist.name: Shared Review Service Reuse
tasks: Reuse or harden `ILlmSuggestionReviewService` with batch-capable approve/reject methods.
Ensure single review can continue using the same service.

implementationChecklist.name: Bulk API Surface
tasks: Add or reconcile bulk command, request model, result model, and controller action.
Apply suite-owner validation, filter parsing, and zero-match behavior.

implementationChecklist.name: Verification
tasks: Add targeted unit tests for batch behavior.
Run unit tests and WebAPI build.
Inspect Docker/compose conclusion and report it explicitly.
